verdicts.reason: Internal Gnostic doctrine: the Pleroma is the Monad's own emanated fullness. Source and the totality of Aeons are a single attested teaching within one textual corpus (Sethian/Valentinian). A doctrinal link, not a cross-family cognate. Tier 2 holds.
Sophia is the youngest Aeon of the Pleroma in the same texts (Apocryphon of John, Valentinian myth). Her fall is internal to the Fullness. Attested within one tradition's documents. Tier 2 holds.

Yaldabaoth as the malformed offspring of Sophia's fall is explicit in the Apocryphon of John and related Sethian texts. Mother-and-demiurge are bound as documented narrative cause-and-effect within the same corpus. Tier 2 holds.
The Demiurge's cosmos as prison and the captive spark of light are the two poles of the same Gnostic drama, documented across the tradition's texts. An internal doctrinal inversion. Tier 2 holds.
The light Sophia lost being the spark sown into humanity is core Gnostic soteriology, attested in the same myth-cycle. Internal doctrinal link, one corpus. Tier 2 holds.

The correspondence axiom is the teaching of the Hermetica (Emerald Tablet / Corpus Hermeticum) ascribed to Hermes Trismegistus himself. Teacher and teaching are one within the same body of texts. Tier 2 holds.
The Two Principles are the system Mani proclaimed and authored. Prophet and his own doctrine are inseparable and documented (Mani's own writings, Coptic Manichaean texts). Tier 2 holds.

The Gnostic identification of the Genesis creator with the blind demiurge Yaldabaoth is explicitly documented: the Apocryphon of John quotes the creator's 'I am God and there is no other' (Isaiah 45:5 / Exodus echo) AND glosses it as the demiurge's arrogant blindness. A real intertextual inversion of the Abrahamic creator in actual texts. Tier 2 holds.

Mani, raised in Sasanian Iran, demonstrably drew on Zoroastrian dualism; he named Zoroaster among his forerunners. The engagement with the Iranian good-Spirit/evil-Spirit template is a documented historical borrowing (then radicalised into anti-cosmic dualism). Attested contact, not mere resemblance. Tier 2 holds.

Same documented Iranian descent: Mani built the Light-Darkness war on the co-primordial good/evil template of Zoroastrian cosmology, naming Zoroaster a forerunner. Historical transmission of doctrine is attested. Tier 2 holds.

Mani called himself an apostle of Jesus Christ and counted Jesus among the true apostles of Light; the Jesus of Light is venerated across Manichaean texts. A deliberate, documented incorporation of Christ into the fused religion. Tier 2 holds.

Mani placed himself as Seal of the Prophets within a succession that explicitly includes Zoroaster, whose tradition awaits the Saoshyant. His self-insertion into and completion of the Iranian prophetic line is documented in his own claims. Tier 2 holds as an attested syncretic incorporation.

Mani named the Buddha among prior messengers of Light, and Manichaeism's eastward spread in explicit Buddhist dress along the Silk Road is well documented (Uyghur/Chinese Manichaean texts). A deliberate, attested incorporation. Tier 2 holds.

Hermes Trismegistus is the documented Hellenistic syncretism of Greek Hermes with Egyptian Thoth; the Greek psychopomp is one half of the figure by direct identification, not parallel. An attested Greco-Egyptian fusion. Tier 2 holds.

The seam's own wording is 'closely parallels' — a structural analogy between Hermetic spheres-ascent and the Kabbalist climb to Ein Sof. The named contact is Renaissance cross-fertilisation (Pico, Ficino), which is real but late and did not generate either figure; it post-dates and merely juxtaposes two already-formed systems. The load-bearing claim is structural parallel, not a borrowing that produced Ein Sof. Down-tier to 3 (analogous).

The unknowable Source beyond being from which graded emanations flow is genuine shared structure, but direct Gnostic-to-Kabbalah transmission producing Ein Sof is scholarly-contested, not firmly documented; the Lurianic contraction/fall 'echo' is itself a typological parallel. The honest claim is analogous structure (the strongest of the three Kabbalah seams, but still a parallel). Down-tier to 3.

The reasoning actually argues Sophia->Shekhinah (fallen feminine wisdom), not Sophia->Ein Sof, so the endpoint is mismatched. And the Sophia/Shekhinah link, while a real and frequently-drawn scholarly comparison, is a typological/analogous parallel whose 'attested prototype' status with direct transmission is contested, not a documented borrowing. Down-tier to 3 (analogous).
